message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "backend" as backend #D3E5F8#04192B
database MySQL

User ->> backend : seenNotification(Notification_id, token)
activate backend
note right of backend: confirm JWT token
deactivate backend

alt [(token is invalid)]
    backend --> User : Unauthorized
else [(token is valid)]
    activate backend
    note left of backend: clearUnreadNotification (Notification_id)
    
    deactivate backend
    
end


@enduml
